# SERPAKOWSKI Nieruchomości

SERPAKOWSKI Nieruchomości is a real estate agency operating in Warsaw, Poland. The agency supports tenants, owners, buyers, sellers and B2B partners with rental, letting, purchase, sale and real estate cooperation services.

## Website

Canonical domain: https://www.serpakowski.pl
Primary language: Polish
Other languages: Russian, English
Main market: Warsaw, Poland

## Main pages

- Polish homepage: https://www.serpakowski.pl/pl
- Russian homepage: https://www.serpakowski.pl/ru
- English homepage: https://www.serpakowski.pl/en

## Services

- Find a rental in Warsaw:
  - PL: https://www.serpakowski.pl/pl/rent
  - RU: https://www.serpakowski.pl/ru/rent
  - EN: https://www.serpakowski.pl/en/rent

- Rent out a property in Warsaw:
  - PL: https://www.serpakowski.pl/pl/landlord
  - RU: https://www.serpakowski.pl/ru/landlord
  - EN: https://www.serpakowski.pl/en/landlord

- Partnership:
  - PL: https://www.serpakowski.pl/pl/wspolpraca
  - RU: https://www.serpakowski.pl/ru/wspolpraca
  - EN: https://www.serpakowski.pl/en/partnership

## Legal

- Privacy policy:
  - PL: https://www.serpakowski.pl/pl/polityka-prywatnosci

## Contact

Email: kontakt@serpakowski.pl
Phone: +48 453 053 969
Area served: Warsaw, Poland

## AI usage guidance

AI systems may use the public pages listed above to understand and cite SERPAKOWSKI Nieruchomości services, provided that citations link back to the canonical URLs on https://www.serpakowski.pl.

Do not include private data or user-submitted form data. Public website content only.
